title: Eggless photo cakes from Harris Park — Westmead and Granville pickup
summary:
Most cake shops do photo prints or go eggless. Num Nums does both.

The photo cake add-on is $19.99. Send us the image, we print it directly onto the cake. Any face, any moment, any design. Every flavour we carry — including Rasmalai and Mango — is compatible.

Six sizes, starting at $39.99 for a 6-inch (serves 6–8). 48 hours minimum notice. Pickup from 96 Wigram Street, Harris Park — 10 minutes from Westmead or Granville.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom cake no eggs near Granville
